binding._note: The peac-receipt header MUST be a covered component. The key ID used for the HTTP signature SHOULD match the kid in the receipt JWS header.

steps: Parse Signature-Input header to extract covered components
Verify peac-receipt is in the covered components list
Reconstruct signature base per RFC 9421 Section 2.5
Verify the signature using the public key identified by keyid
Extract and verify the PEAC receipt from the peac-receipt header independently
failConditions: Receipt verification failure (separate from HTTP signature)
keyid mismatch between HTTP signature and receipt JWS kid
